filter_reason: Borderline major-player call, included per the in-doubt rule: it's a positioning document rather than a concrete deal, but OpenAI formalizing principles for government and national-security work is a strategic move with real consequence.
summary: OpenAI published its framework for government and national-security partnerships, laying out principles around responsible use, democratic accountability, and public safety. It's a principles post rather than a specific contract, but it telegraphs how far OpenAI intends to go with defense and government customers. Useful context for reading future deals in this space.
title: Our approach to government and national security partnerships
excerpt: Learn how OpenAI approaches government and national security partnerships, with principles for responsible AI use, democratic accountability, and public safety.
